economic_alpha_finding.ml_alpha_channel: forecasting upstream latency/reuse, not re-predicting deterministic cost

A_existing_scorer_baseline.description: production constraint scorer w/o overlay — 0 economic terms computable

B_overlay_deterministic_formula.description: economic overlay deterministic formula (STRONGEST baseline; ground truth for cost targets)

C_overlay_plus_deterministic_priors.note: deterministic priors do not change the realised goodput/$ ground truth; they would change FORECASTED decisions only

D_overlay_plus_ml_latency.note: ML latency improvement is the only channel to economic alpha here; see below

F_overlay_plus_ml_cost_energy.note: cost targets are deterministic; ML cannot beat the formula → diagnostic_only

G_overlay_plus_ml_goodput.note: goodput/$ is deterministic given inputs → diagnostic_only

H_overlay_plus_all_eligible_ml.description: overlay + all eligible ML modules (latency + cache)
